name: Zucchini Fiesta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini and crookneck squash crosswise into 1/4 inch thick slices.
2. Cut the olives in half crosswise.
3. Steam the prepared vegetables over boiling water until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and plunge into ice water to cool; drain well.
4. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, and cumin.
5. Add the drained squash and stir lightly.
6. Chill for 30 minutes.
7. Add onion, chilies, olives, and cheese.
8. Peel and pit the avocado; cut into small cubes.
9. Add to the salad and mix lightly.
10. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on four salad plates. Mound equal portions of salad on each plate. Garnish each salad with a sprig of coriander.
